word: G1159 - δαπανάω - dapanáō - dap-an-ah'-o - Be at charges

sections.paragraph:
- Original: δαπανάω

- Transliteration: Dapanao

- Phonetic: dap-an-ah'-o

- Definition:

1. to incur expense, expend, spend

2. in a bad sense: to waste, squander, consume

- Origin: from G1160

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1160; to expend that is (in a good sense) to incur cost or (in a bad one) to waste: - be at charges consume spend.
